title: Retinal Cell Death Protocol
author: David A. Antonetti
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yaafsae
materials: Homogenize the retina and keep it on ice
Carefully remove the solution by aspiration

steps.title: Add the retina sample and weigh...
steps.instruction: Add the retina sample and weigh the retina with tube to obtain the retinal weight

steps.title: Freeze the retina in liquid nitrogen...
steps.instruction: Freeze the retina in liquid nitrogen and store at -80°C (or use fresh retina)

steps.title: Add 50 µl 1x Lysis buffer to each mouse retina
steps.instruction: Add 50 µl 1x Lysis buffer to each mouse retina

steps.title: Vortex and incubate the sample at...
steps.instruction: Vortex and incubate the sample at room temperature for 30 minutes with gentle rocking

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12500 rpm at 4ºC for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12500 rpm at 4ºC for 10 minutes

steps.title: Collect the supernatant in fresh tube and save the pellet
steps.instruction: Collect the supernatant in fresh tube and save the pellet

steps.title: Add 20 µl of samples, positive...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µl of samples, positive control (supplied in kit) and blank or negative control (lysis buffer) in each well (triplicates)

steps.title: Add 80 µl of Immuno reagent to each well
steps.instruction: Add 80 µl of Immuno reagent to each well

steps.title: Cover the plate with adhesive strip,...
steps.instruction: Cover the plate with adhesive strip, cover with foil and incubate with gentle shacking (300 rpm) at room temperature for 2 hours

steps.title: Aspirate each well and wash by...
steps.instruction: Aspirate each well and wash by filling each well with 200 µl of incubation buffer 1x (bottle #4) using multi-channel pipette

steps.title: Repeating the washing process for a total of 5 washes
steps.instruction: Repeating the washing process for a total of 5 washes

steps.title: Add 100 µl of ABTS Solution...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl of ABTS Solution to each well and incubate on plate shaker (protect from light) until color develops (about 10 min)

steps.title: Add 100 µl of ABTS stop...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl of ABTS stop solution to each well and gently tap the plate to ensure thorough mixing

steps.title: Read the plate within 30 minutes...
steps.instruction: Read the plate within 30 minutes at 405 nm using ABTS solution plus 100 µl of ATBS stop solution as blank (use reference wavelength 490 nm)
